features.title: Contract artifact contract/schemas/jsonrpc.schema.json
features.description: SSOT feature tracking for contract/schemas/jsonrpc.schema.json.

features.title: Transport concern: ALPN
features.description: Enumerate known values while permitting extension values. Must align with TLS and SVCB/Alt-Svc advertisements. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-alpn.

features.title: Transport concern: Alt-Svc
features.description: Should validate advertised protocols such as h2 and h3; does not change the current request scope, only future alternatives. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-alt-svc.

features.title: Transport concern: ECH
features.description: Usually advertised through HTTPS/SVCB. Track without requiring applications to parse raw ECH config unless available. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-ech.

features.title: Transport concern: Early hints
features.description: Must not replace final http.response.start; should be constrained to 1xx status range, especially 103. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-early-hints.

features.title: Transport concern: HTTP/3 advertisement
features.description: Advertisement is not the same as negotiated H3. Need separate fields for advertised, selected, and effective protocol. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-http-3-advertisement.

features.title: Transport concern: HTTPS DNS record
features.description: Keep distinct from URI scheme https. This is a DNS RR type using SVCB parameter semantics. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-https-dns-record.

features.title: Transport concern: HTTPS scheme
features.description: https is not a separate scope. Behind proxy, effective scheme must come from trusted forwarding or direct TLS. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-https-scheme.

features.title: Transport concern: HTTPS/SVCB
features.description: Keep combined profile for policy/reporting, but retain separate schemas for generic SVCB and HTTPS RR. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-https-svcb.

features.title: Transport concern: Proxy forwarding
features.description: Untrusted forwarded headers must be ignored or preserved-only. Must distinguish Forwarded, X-Forwarded-*, X-Real-IP, CDN headers, and proxy protocol. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-proxy-forwarding.

features.title: Transport concern: Redirect
features.description: Redirect correctness depends on proxy forwarding trust, effective scheme/host/port/root path, and allowed status codes. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-redirect.

features.title: Transport concern: SVCB
features.description: Track as discovery metadata, not as an ASGI scope type. Should support alias mode and service mode. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-svcb.

features.title: Transport concern: TLS
features.description: Align with ASGI scope.extensions.tls; current ext.transport.tls is useful but not shape-compatible. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-tls.

features.title: Transport concern: Trailers
features.description: Response trailers are valid only after body frames when trailers were announced. Header pair encoding must match ASGI byte-pair policy. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-trailers.

features.title: Transport concern: Upgrade
features.description: WebSocket is standard ASGI scope behavior; non-WebSocket upgrade and extended CONNECT need explicit profile boundaries. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-upgrade.

features.title: Transport concern: mTLS
features.description: Must distinguish absent cert, present verified cert, present failed cert, and cert forwarded by trusted proxy/load balancer. Promoted from reports/normalized_master_feature_matrix.xlsx as agreed normalized candidate feat:concern-mtls.

features.title: Executable event-instance contract
features.description: Defines the executable contract layer for event instance schemas, validators, lifecycle state, identity integrity, capability gates, and completion verification.

features.title: HTTP request event payload schema
features.description: Defines the required, optional, and forbidden payload fields for http.request event instances.

features.title: HTTP disconnect event payload schema
features.description: Defines the payload field contract for http.disconnect event instances.

features.title: HTTP response start event payload schema
features.description: Defines the payload field contract for http.response.start event instances.

features.title: HTTP response body event payload schema
features.description: Defines body, more_body, and forbidden-field rules for http.response.body event instances.

features.title: WebSocket connect event payload schema
features.description: Defines the payload field contract for websocket.connect event instances.

features.title: WebSocket receive event payload schema
features.description: Defines text, bytes, and mutual-exclusion payload rules for websocket.receive event instances.

features.title: WebSocket disconnect event payload schema
features.description: Defines code, reason, and forbidden-field rules for websocket.disconnect event instances.

features.title: WebSocket accept event payload schema
features.description: Defines headers, subprotocol, and forbidden-field rules for websocket.accept event instances.

features.title: WebSocket send event payload schema
features.description: Defines text, bytes, and mutual-exclusion payload rules for websocket.send event instances.

features.title: WebSocket close event payload schema
features.description: Defines code, reason, and terminal-close payload rules for websocket.close event instances.

features.title: WebTransport connect event payload schema
features.description: Defines the payload field contract for webtransport.connect event instances.

features.title: WebTransport accept event payload schema
features.description: Defines the payload field contract for webtransport.accept event instances.

features.title: WebTransport stream receive event payload schema
features.description: Defines stream_id, body bytes, ordering, and terminal fragment rules for webtransport.stream.receive event instances.

features.title: WebTransport stream send event payload schema
features.description: Defines stream_id, body bytes, ordering, and finalization rules for webtransport.stream.send event instances.

features.title: WebTransport datagram receive event payload schema
features.description: Defines datagram_id, payload bytes, and forbidden stream fields for webtransport.datagram.receive event instances.

features.title: WebTransport datagram send event payload schema
features.description: Defines datagram_id, payload bytes, and forbidden stream fields for webtransport.datagram.send event instances.

features.title: WebTransport disconnect event payload schema
features.description: Defines close code, reason, and terminal session payload rules for webtransport.disconnect event instances.

features.title: WebTransport close event payload schema
features.description: Defines close code, reason, and terminal session payload rules for webtransport.close event instances.

features.title: Lifespan startup event payload schema
features.description: Defines required and forbidden fields for lifespan.startup event instances.

features.title: Lifespan startup complete event payload schema
features.description: Defines completion payload rules for lifespan.startup.complete event instances.

features.title: Lifespan startup failed event payload schema
features.description: Defines message/error payload rules for lifespan.startup.failed event instances.

features.title: Lifespan shutdown event payload schema
features.description: Defines required and forbidden fields for lifespan.shutdown event instances.

features.title: Lifespan shutdown complete event payload schema
features.description: Defines completion payload rules for lifespan.shutdown.complete event instances.

features.title: Lifespan shutdown failed event payload schema
features.description: Defines message/error payload rules for lifespan.shutdown.failed event instances.

features.title: Transport emit complete event payload schema
features.description: Defines target identity, completion level, and forbidden transport-family payload fields for transport.emit.complete event instances.

features.title: Event payload field invariants
features.description: Defines required, optional, forbidden, and mutually exclusive payload fields across event instance schemas.

features.title: Event instance validator API
features.description: Defines the generated runtime-neutral validator contract for checking event instance payloads, scopes, lifecycle state, identities, and completion ordering.

features.title: Event scope capability gates
features.description: Rejects event emissions that violate scope-declared capabilities such as WebTransport datagram support.

features.title: Event UnitIds identity invariants
features.description: Enforces UnitIds presence, family specificity, session consistency, and open-unit references across event lifecycles.

features.title: Event completion ordering rules
features.description: Promotes completion metadata into enforceable ordering rules for finalization, flush, and transport.emit.complete events.

features.title: Generated event validator parity
features.description: Ensures generated Python, Rust, and TypeScript validator surfaces apply the same event instance contract semantics.

issues.title: Event payload schema gap
issues.description: Per-event discriminated payload schemas and payload field invariants are not yet represented as executable contract artifacts.

issues.title: Event lifecycle automata gap
issues.description: Per-family lifecycle automata are not yet encoded for request, session, message, stream, and datagram event sequences.

issues.title: Event scope capability validation gap
issues.description: Scope capabilities are not yet tied to event emission validation, including WebTransport datagram support checks.

issues.title: Event UnitIds identity integrity gap
issues.description: UnitIds are not yet enforced across event payloads, session consistency, open-unit references, and family-specific identity constraints.

issues.title: Completion semantics operational gap
issues.description: Completion metadata is not yet operationalized as enforceable finalization, flush, and transport.emit.complete ordering rules.

issues.title: Contract version compatibility drift
issues.description: Compatibility metadata reports contract_version 0.1.0 while the authoritative VERSION, manifest, and generated package version metadata report 0.1.2.
